title: Isostigma peucedanifolium
intro: Isostigma peucedanifolium, commonly known as the Chinese angelica, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Isostigma peucedanifolium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being included in various compound prescriptions to promote health and well-being.
